# El Contactico — GitHub Copilot Instructions

Hyperlocal services directory for Costa Rica. Launches with a single district; architecture supports every canton/district in the country from day one.

## Stack
- **Frontend**: Astro 6 + Alpine.js (SSG-first, SEO-first, no heavy JS frameworks)
- **Database**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + auto-generated API)
- **Hosting**: Vercel (deploy via git push)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Language**: TypeScript strict

## Key architecture
- URLs: `/{canton}/{district}/{category}` — e.g. `/cartago/san-nicolas/fontaneria`
- Multi-tenancy by data, NOT by code — one deploy serves all of CR, filtered by `canton_id`/`district_id`
- No custom backend: typed Supabase JS client for reads; mutations via Astro Actions
- SEO-first: Astro generates static HTML for canton/district/category/provider pages
- `LocalBusiness` schema with `areaServed` for hyperlocal AI overview matching (2026 best practice)

## Project structure
```
src/
  pages/           # Routes — kebab-case, [param].astro for dynamic
    index.astro
    [canton]/index.astro
    [canton]/[distrito]/index.astro
    [canton]/[distrito]/[categoria].astro
    proveedor/[id].astro
    api/           # External webhooks only
  components/
    ui/            # Button, Card, Badge, Input
    directory/     # ProviderCard, CategoryGrid, SearchBar
    seo/           # JsonLd, OpenGraph, Breadcrumbs
  layouts/         # BaseLayout, DirectoryLayout, ProviderLayout
  lib/
    supabase.ts    # Singleton typed client
    queries/       # One file per domain — providers.ts, categories.ts, geography.ts
    seo/           # JSON-LD generators
    slug.ts
    logger.ts
  actions/index.ts # Astro Actions (Zod-validated mutations)
  types/database.types.ts  # Generated by supabase gen types — never hand-edit
  env.d.ts
```

Path aliases in `tsconfig.json`:
- `@components/*` → `./src/components/*`
- `@layouts/*` → `./src/layouts/*`
- `@lib/*` → `./src/lib/*`
- `@types/*` → `./src/types/*`
- `@actions/*` → `./src/actions/*`

## Data model
- `cantons` (id, name, slug)
- `districts` (id, canton_id, name, slug)
- `categories` (id, name, slug, icon_emoji)
- `providers` (id, name, phone, whatsapp, email, description, photo_url, district_id, **owner_id** uuid REFERENCES auth.users, verified, created_at)
- `provider_categories` (provider_id, category_id) — N:N
- `reviews` (id, provider_id, author_id, rating, comment, created_at)

RLS enabled on every table. `providers` readable when `verified = true`; writes gated to `auth.uid() = owner_id`.

## Core conventions (apply everywhere)
- Slugs: kebab-case, no accents — use `toSlug` from `@lib/slug`
- Every Supabase query lives in `src/lib/queries/<domain>.ts` — never inline in `.astro`
- Every `providers` query filters by `district_id` minimum
- No `select('*')` — list columns explicitly
- No `console.log` in production — use `logger` from `@lib/logger`
- Mutations go through Astro Actions in `src/actions/`, not API routes
- Provider images in Supabase Storage bucket `provider-photos`
- `PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` and `PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` in `.env`; `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` Vercel-only, never committed
- Never hardcode canton, district, or category IDs
- No `../../../` chains — always use path aliases

## Instruction files (apply automatically by file type)
Detailed rules are in `.github/instructions/`:
- `architecture.instructions.md` — full architecture rationale (`applyTo: "**"`)
- `antipatterns.instructions.md` — 15 concrete before/after patterns to never introduce (`applyTo: "**"`)
- `performance.instructions.md` — render hierarchy, image rules, JS bundle, perf budgets (`applyTo: "**"`)
- `queries.instructions.md` — Supabase query rules: columns, batching, indexes, RLS (`applyTo: "src/lib/queries/**,src/actions/**,src/lib/supabase.ts"`)
- `astro.instructions.md` — Astro 6 rules (`applyTo: "**/*.astro,astro.config.mjs"`)
- `multi-district.instructions.md` — multi-tenancy invariants (`applyTo: "**"`)
- `supabase.instructions.md` — Supabase query/auth/storage rules (`applyTo: "src/lib/**"`)
- `astro-patterns.instructions.md` — copyable Astro code patterns
- `astro-seo.instructions.md` — SEO templates and JSON-LD patterns
- `cr-geo.instructions.md` — Costa Rica geography and slug conventions
- `supabase-patterns.instructions.md` — Supabase query/storage code patterns

## Prompts (run from Chat with / or prompt picker)
- `/add-provider` — guide to add a provider manually or via SQL
- `/deploy-check` — pre-deploy checklist
- `/new-district` — add a new canton/district to the system

## Agents (custom modes in Copilot)
- `code-reviewer` — reviews against antipatterns/performance/queries/security/SEO rules. Run before every commit.
- `qa-tester` — designs and executes tests via Playwright MCP + Chrome DevTools MCP against the dev server. Persistent test corpus lives in `qa/`. Modes: smoke, targeted feature, exploratory, regression codification, performance audit.
- `performance-auditor` — static analysis of a page or component for speed. Complements `qa-tester` (live Lighthouse).
- `db-architect` — schema, migrations, RLS, indexes, type generation
- `frontend-dev` — Astro components, pages, layouts, Tailwind UI
- `seo-agent` — meta tags, JSON-LD, sitemaps, local search optimization

## QA system (cross-tool, project-wide)
- `qa/README.md` — folder layout and test-case file format
- `qa/test-plan.md` — master coverage matrix, risk register, performance budgets
- `qa/test-cases/` — durable test corpus (smoke, forms, flows, accessibility, performance, regression)
- `qa/runs/` — per-run results with evidence
- `qa/fixtures/` — test users and seed data references

## Checks
- Build: `npm run build`
- Dev: `npm run dev`
- Types after schema change: `npm run db:types`
